ORDER RE PLAINTIFF'S MOTIONS TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTIONS TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND DEPOSITION QUESTIONS IS GRANTED. THE OBJECTIONS OF IRRELEVANCY AND PRIVACY ARE OVERRULED. TO THE EXTENT THAT DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO REQUEST #17 SEEK COMMUNICATIONS PROTECTED BY THE ATTORNEY - CLIENT OR ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT PRIVILEGES AND ARE WITHHELD, PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE A PRIVILEGE LOG. THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER AS TO ENTERING INTO A STIPULATED PROTECTED ORDER AND CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT REGARDING COPIES OF ANY DOCUMENTS PRODUCED TO DEFENDANT. PRODUCTION SHALL TAKE PLACE WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND TO THE QUESTIONS SET FORTH IN DEFENDANT'S SEPARATE STATEMENT OF MATTERS IN DISPUTE, AND REASONABLE FOLLOW-UP QUESTIONS, AT A TIME MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TO THE PARTIES. THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF SHALL BE COMPLETED WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
